page_content:
Biochemistry Major, Spring Junior Year (15 Credits)

BCHM 485 (3 credits) Physical Biochemistry

Or CHEM 482

The application of physical chemistry to biological systems. Principal topics: quantum mechanics, biochemical spectroscopy, statistical mechanics, polymer dynamics, transport processes in liquid phase, chemical and biochemical kinetics, modeling and simulation. (Spring semester only/may take CHEM 482 instead.)
